title: Harness — 开源 CI/CD 与软件交付平台
summary: Harness 是一体化软件交付平台，内置持续集成、持续交付、Feature Flags、Cloud Cost Management 等模块，通过 AI 驱动的管道优化与自动化策略降低部署失败率。
summary_en: Harness is an end-to-end software delivery platform with built-in CI/CD, Feature Flags, and Cloud Cost Management, leveraging AI-driven pipeline optimization to reduce deployment failures.
